attributes.Sql Query:
SEL 
 ST.TOP_PID                       
,ST.SW_ASSEMBLY                   
,ST.COMMERCIAL_SW_ITEM            
,ST.AGREEMENT_PART                
,ST.ROYALTY_INDEX                 
,ST.MULTIPLIER                    
,ST.RECORD_TYPE                   
,ST.NAT_TREATMENT                 
,ST.NAT_OFFERING_NAME             
,ST.PRODUCT_FAMILY                
,ST.N_ATTRIBUTE1                  
,ST.N_ATTRIBUTE2                  
,ST.N_ATTRIBUTE3                  
,ST.N_ATTRIBUTE4                  
,ST.N_ATTRIBUTE5                  
,ST.V_ATTRIBUTE1                  
,ST.V_ATTRIBUTE2                  
,ST.V_ATTRIBUTE3                  
,ST.V_ATTRIBUTE4                  
,ST.V_ATTRIBUTE5                  
,ST.D_ATTRIBUTE1                  
,ST.D_ATTRIBUTE2                  
,ST.D_ATTRIBUTE3                  
,ST.D_ATTRIBUTE4                  
,ST.D_ATTRIBUTE5                  
,ST.CREATION_DATE                 
,ST.CREATED_BY                    
,ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_REFADM_BRM_ROYALTY_PIDS ST
WHERE ST.RECORD_TYPE='PLM'
AND (NOT EXISTS (
SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1 WHERE ST.TOP_PID=NP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (
SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2 WHERE  ST.SW_ASSEMBLY=NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (
SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP3 WHERE  ST.COMMERCIAL_SW_ITEM=NP3.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (
SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP4 WHERE  ST.AGREEMENT_PART=NP4.BK_PRODUCT_ID))

UNION ALL

SEL 
 ST.TOP_PID                       
,ST.SW_ASSEMBLY                   
,ST.COMMERCIAL_SW_ITEM            
,ST.AGREEMENT_PART                
,ST.ROYALTY_INDEX                 
,ST.MULTIPLIER                    
,ST.RECORD_TYPE                   
,ST.NAT_TREATMENT                 
,ST.NAT_OFFERING_NAME             
,ST.PRODUCT_FAMILY                
,ST.N_ATTRIBUTE1                  
,ST.N_ATTRIBUTE2                  
,ST.N_ATTRIBUTE3                  
,ST.N_ATTRIBUTE4                  
,ST.N_ATTRIBUTE5                  
,ST.V_ATTRIBUTE1                  
,ST.V_ATTRIBUTE2                  
,ST.V_ATTRIBUTE3                  
,ST.V_ATTRIBUTE4                  
,ST.V_ATTRIBUTE5                  
,ST.D_ATTRIBUTE1                  
,ST.D_ATTRIBUTE2                  
,ST.D_ATTRIBUTE3                  
,ST.D_ATTRIBUTE4                  
,ST.D_ATTRIBUTE5                  
,ST.CREATION_DATE                 
,ST.CREATED_BY                    
,ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_REFADM_BRM_ROYALTY_PIDS ST
WHERE ST.RECORD_TYPE='NONPLM'
AND (NOT EXISTS (
SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1 WHERE ST.TOP_PID=NP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (
SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2 WHERE  ST.SW_ASSEMBLY=NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (
SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP3 WHERE  ST.COMMERCIAL_SW_ITEM=NP3.BK_PRODUCT_ID))

SEL 
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NARP.TOP_PRODUCT_KEY,NARP.ROYALTY_MODEL_INDEX_NUM,NARP.ROYALTY_MULTIPLIER_INT,NARP.RECORD_TYPE,NARP.RU_SW_ASSEMBLY_PRDT_KEY,NARP.RU_COMMERCIAL_SW_ITM_PRDT_KEY,NARP.RU_AGREMNT_PART_PRDT_KEY DESC) AS APSP_ROYALTY_PRODUCT_KEY
,NARP.TOP_PRODUCT_KEY
,NARP.ROYALTY_MODEL_INDEX_NUM
,COALESCE(NARP.ROYALTY_MULTIPLIER_INT,-999)
,COALESCE(NARP.RECORD_TYPE,'UNK')
,COALESCE(NARP.NET_ACCTNG_TREATMENT_FLG,'U')
,COALESCE(NARP.NAT_OFFERING_NAME,'UNKNOWN')
,NARP.RU_SW_ASSEMBLY_PRDT_KEY
,NARP.RU_COMMERCIAL_SW_ITM_PRDT_KEY
,NARP.RU_AGREMNT_PART_PRDT_KEY
,COALESCE(NARP.RU_AGREEMENT_ID,'UNKNOWN')
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SEL
 NP1.ITEM_KEY    AS TOP_PRODUCT_KEY
,ST.ROYALTY_INDEX       AS ROYALTY_MODEL_INDEX_NUM 
,ST.MULTIPLIER AS ROYALTY_MULTIPLIER_INT
,ST.RECORD_TYPE  AS RECORD_TYPE                  
,ST.NAT_TREATMENT   AS NET_ACCTNG_TREATMENT_FLG     
,ST.NAT_OFFERING_NAME    AS NAT_OFFERING_NAME
,NP2.ITEM_KEY  AS RU_SW_ASSEMBLY_PRDT_KEY
,NP3.ITEM_KEY AS RU_COMMERCIAL_SW_ITM_PRDT_KEY
,NP4.ITEM_KEY AS RU_AGREMNT_PART_PRDT_KEY
,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(20)) AS RU_AGREEMENT_ID
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_REFADM_BRM_ROYALTY_PIDS ST
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
ON ST.TOP_PID=NP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID          
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
ON ST.SW_ASSEMBLY=NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID          
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP3
ON ST.COMMERCIAL_SW_ITEM=NP3.BK_PRODUCT_ID  
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP4
ON ST.AGREEMENT_PART=NP4.BK_PRODUCT_ID  
WHERE 
ST.RECORD_TYPE='PLM'

UNION ALL

SEL
 NP1.ITEM_KEY    AS TOP_PRODUCT_KEY
,ST.ROYALTY_INDEX       AS ROYALTY_MODEL_INDEX_NUM 
,ST.MULTIPLIER AS ROYALTY_MULTIPLIER_INT
,ST.RECORD_TYPE  AS RECORD_TYPE                  
,ST.NAT_TREATMENT   AS NET_ACCTNG_TREATMENT_FLG     
,ST.NAT_OFFERING_NAME    AS NAT_OFFERING_NAME
,NP2.ITEM_KEY  AS RU_SW_ASSEMBLY_PRDT_KEY
,NP3.ITEM_KEY AS RU_COMMERCIAL_SW_ITM_PRDT_KEY
,-999 AS RU_AGREMNT_PART_PRDT_KEY
,ST.AGREEMENT_PART AS RU_AGREEMENT_ID
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_REFADM_BRM_ROYALTY_PIDS ST
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
ON ST.TOP_PID=NP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID          
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
ON ST.SW_ASSEMBLY=NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP3
ON ST.COMMERCIAL_SW_ITEM=NP3.BK_PRODUCT_ID           
WHERE 
ST.RECORD_TYPE='NONPLM'
)NARP
